title: Dutch-Style Pan-Fried Mozzarella Fritters
description: A crispy and savory Dutch-inspired fritter recipe filled with melted mozzarella cheese.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
2. In a bowl, mix the Dutch cheese, mozzarella cheese, eggs, flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the fritters to the bowl and mix until well combined.
4. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the cheese mixture into the pan.
5. Flatten each ball slightly with a spatula.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown on the bottom.
7. Flip and cook for another 2 minutes or until golden brown.
